RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0004 Page 4 of 5 Statement of Account — continued Transaction Running Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 23/10/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 2,328 4,725 05/11/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 349 1,586 5,962 25/11/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - - 5,962 03/08/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 740 6,702 09/09/2025 UTILITY BILL - 1,722 8,424 22/04/2025 UTILITY BILL 543 - 7,881 25/12/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 898 - 6,983 10/08/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 845 2,231 8,369 12/10/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 8,369 02/11/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - 1,172 9,541 11/01/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 9,541 05/11/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 428 572 9,685 07/06/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 475 10,160 09/12/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 872 11,032 26/10/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - - 11,032 18/07/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 683 - 10,349 Approved
